title: Revision + Practice
tagline: 10 दिन, 10 Topics — अब सब कुछ एक साथ!
summary: Day 10 is your Mega Revision Day! आपने पिछले 9 दिनों में English की बहुत strong foundation बनाई है। आज हम सब topics को एक साथ revise करेंगे, weak areas identify करेंगे, और एक full mock test देंगे। जो topics weak लगें उन्हें extra practice करें। याद रहे — revision ही retention की key है!
hindiSummary: आपने सीखा है: Basic English (Day 1), Self Introduction (Day 2), Imperative Sentences (Day 3), Be Verb am/is/are/was/were (Day 4), Demonstrative Pronouns this/that/these/those (Day 5), Has/Have (Day 6), Had (Day 7), Will Have (Day 8), Use of There (Day 9). आज इन सब को एक साथ mix करके practice करेंगे। Mixed practice से ही true mastery आती है।
whatYouWillRevise: Day 1: SVO structure, Simple Present, Do/Does, Pronouns, Articles
Day 2: Introduction templates, My name is/I am from/I work as
Day 6: Have (I/You/We/They) + Has (He/She/It) + Present Perfect + Expressions
Day 7: Had for past possession + Past Perfect (had+V3) + Conditionals
Day 8: Will Have + V3 + By [time] + Professional deadlines
Day 9: There is/are (present) + was/were (past) + will be (future) + Questions

revisionStrategy.step1: Read the cheat sheet for all 9 topics (20 min)
revisionStrategy.step2: Do 50 mixed questions without looking at answers (30 min)
revisionStrategy.step3: Check answers and identify weak topics (10 min)
revisionStrategy.step4: Go back and re-read weak topic theory (20 min)
revisionStrategy.step6: Give the full mock test (45 min)
revisionStrategy.step7: Review wrong answers and note mistakes (15 min)

megaCheatSheet.demonstrative: Singular near=This | Singular far=That | Plural near=These | Plural far=Those
megaCheatSheet.there: One thing now=There is | Many things now=There are | Past singular=There was | Past plural=There were | Future=There will be
megaCheatSheet.imperative: Command=base verb | Polite=Please+base verb | Negative=Don't+base verb | Warning=Never+base verb
megaCheatSheet.simplePresent: I/We/You/They=base verb | He/She/It=verb+s | Question=Do/Does+subject+base verb | Negative=don't/doesn't+base verb

weakAreaTest: Answer 10 questions from each Day 1-9 topic quickly. Mark which topics you get wrong — those are your weak areas.
motivationalQuote: 10 days complete! You have built a foundation that 90% of English learners don't have. Now it's time to build the walls!

practiceTarget.writingTarget: Write a paragraph using grammar from all 9 topics
